title: Notification domain and user API
objective: Create apps.notifications with server-side notification event storage, per-user recipient state and API for the current user's notification feed.
non_goals: Do not implement Push API or Web Push subscriptions.
Do not add Tauri device tokens in this first task.
Do not let notifications grant access to source objects.
Do not include sensitive source payloads in notification body.
requirements: Notification events must be immutable enough for audit and replay.
Recipient rows must track new, seen, read and dismissed states.
Feed API must return only notifications for request.user.
Mark-read and dismiss operations must be safe to retry.
Notification payload must include a safe target_url, not raw routing decisions.
acceptance_checks: Authenticated user can fetch their own notifications.
User A cannot fetch or mark User B notifications.
Duplicate client polling does not duplicate events.
Notification body length and allowed metadata are validated.
